prompt: A {argument name="art style" default="vibrant watercolor painting"} poster on textured white paper. A tiny figure in red Hanfu at the bottom right holds a flowing red silk ribbon that sweeps upward, transforming into a surreal, detailed landscape of {argument name="city name" default="Guangzhou"}. The lower ribbon depicts traditional Chinese architecture, a lion dance festival, and cherry blossoms. The middle transitions to a winding river, a cruise ship, modern skyscrapers, and a glowing TV tower. The top fades into green mountains, a waterfall, flying cranes, and fireworks. The scenery is contained within the dynamic ribbon shape against white negative space. Bottom left typography reads "{argument name="season and year" default="SPRING 2026"}" with the year in red, alongside vertical Chinese calligraphy "{argument name="main slogan" default="魅力广州"}" and "{argument name="secondary slogan" default="千年商都"}" with a red seal stamp.
translatedPrompt: 一张 {argument name="art style" default="鲜艳的水彩画"} 风格的海报，印在纹理白纸上。右下角有一个身着红色汉服的小人，手中握着一条向上飘扬的红色丝绸丝带，丝带幻化为 {argument name="city name" default="广州"} 超现实且细节丰富的城市景观。丝带底部描绘了中国传统建筑、舞狮节和樱花；中部过渡为蜿蜒的河流、游轮、现代摩天大楼和发光的电视塔；顶部则渐变为青山、瀑布、飞鹤和烟花。整个景观被包裹在动态的丝带形状中，背景为留白设计。左下角的排版文字为 "{argument name="season and year" default="SPRING 2026"}"（年份为红色），旁边配有竖排中文字体 "{argument name="main slogan" default="魅力广州"}" 和 "{argument name="secondary slogan" default="千年商都"}"，并附带一枚红色印章。

breakdown.creativeCore: 流光丝带城市风光水彩海报：生成一张超现实主义水彩海报，画面中流动的丝带幻化为传统与现代城市地标的融合体，并支持自定义排版。
breakdown.subject: 空间
breakdown.bestUse: 节日海报、城市印象、传统文化视觉、地域品牌

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: watercolor]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
